examples.title: GAN Training Loop
examples.code:
for epoch in epochs:
    for batch in data:
        # Train D
        d_loss = real_loss(D(real)) + fake_loss(D(G(z)))
        update(D)
        
        # Train G
        g_loss = adversarial_loss(D(G(z)))
        update(G)
examples.explanation: Alternating gradient updates for discriminator and generator
